questions.prompt: Answer three questions about yourself. You have 30 seconds for each answer.

questions: Please tell me about your daily routine.
What kinds of food do you like to eat?
Describe your favourite place in your home town.

questions.prompt: Describe the picture, then answer two questions. You have 45 seconds for each answer.

questions: Tell me about a time you cooked or prepared food together with other people.
Do you prefer cooking at home or eating in restaurants? Why?

questions.prompt: Compare the two pictures, then answer two questions. You have 45 seconds for each answer.

questions: Describe and compare the two pictures.
Which of these places would you prefer to eat at? Why?
Why do you think people choose to eat out in different kinds of places?

questions.prompt: You will talk about one topic for two minutes. You have one minute to prepare.

questions: Tell me about a skill you have learned as an adult.
How did you feel while you were learning it?
Why do you think some people give up when learning something new, while others keep going?
